message:
fix(bundler): allow_unsigned also skips verification for signed bundles

When --no-verify flag is specified at CLI level, this now properly skips
signature verification for both unsigned and signed bundles. Previously,
signed bundles would still require verification even with --no-verify.

Improved documentation to clarify allow_unsigned behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
